mapper.select: select minutes_id, meeting_id, content, created_by, create_at, update_at from meeting_minutes where meeting_id = #{meetingId}
mapper.insert: insert into meeting_minutes (meeting_id, content, created_by, create_at) values (#{meetingId}, #{content}, #{createdBy}, #{createAt})
mapper.update: update meeting_minutes set content=#{content}, update_at=#{updateAt} where minutes_id = #{minutesId}
